claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch API/schema already implements research/fetch style evidence support with external/project scope separation. External evidence cannot satisfy existing-project fact requirements.

evidence.summary: CLAUDE_BOUNDARY_TOOLS includes WebFetch and WebSearch; VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES defines project, external, user, unknown.
evidence.why: Core implementation shows WebFetch/WebSearch are available boundary tools and scope system is built-in.

evidence.summary: Agent prompt instructs: 'WebFetch/WebSearch are allowed for external research; mark those records as scope=external and do not use them as project facts.'
evidence.why: Explicit instruction shows the system is designed for research-style evidence with scope labeling.
Shows multiple research tool profiles are supported and normalized.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope() function infers scope from path, url, and source fields with explicit external detection.
evidence.why: Core scope inference logic shows external evidence is detected and handled separately.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() function returns PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE when evidence is external-only.
evidence.why: Readiness enforcement explicitly blocks external-only evidence from satisfying project facts.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordHasDeclaredScope() validates that evidence records declare valid scope explicitly.
evidence.why: Shows mandatory scope declaration is enforced during evidence validation.

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot() captures project file state before agent execution, excluding allowed artifact roots.
evidence.why: Boundary enforcement system prevents project mutation during evidence gathering.

evidence.summary: Post-execution boundary diff generates BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers for any project changes outside artifact roots.
evidence.why: Violations are detected and converted to readiness blockers automatically.

evidence.summary: Test proves external-only evidence cannot satisfy existing project facts and triggers PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE blocker.
evidence.why: Test coverage validates the external/project separation requirement.

evidence.summary: Test confirms claude research profile allows WebFetch/WebSearch while keeping other tools available.
evidence.why: Integration test validates research tool support with boundary enforcement.

evidence.summary: Doctrine states: 'external evidence can come from WebFetch/WebSearch but only as background research, cannot alone prove target project fields.'
evidence.why: Product documentation confirms external evidence is intentionally limited to research context.

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_RESULT_SCHEMA_DEFINITION states: 'scope is project | external | user | unknown; project facts require project-scoped evidence.'
evidence.why: Schema definition documents the contract that project facts require project-scoped evidence.

risks: If this claim is wrong, agents might mix external research with project facts, leading to incorrect PRD readiness decisions.

result.notes: The YOLO demand evidence dispatch system already implements the required behavior: WebFetch/WebSearch are available for external research, evidence must declare scope (project/external/user/unknown), and external-only evidence cannot satisfy existing-project fact requirements. The separation is enforced at multiple validation layers and confirmed by comprehensive tests.
